vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural integrity and aerodynamic performance for the wing
Ensure airflow over the wing rib
Transfer lift and structural loads from spar to skin
Dissipate heat from sun-exposed areas to cooling fins

verify.value: All required fields present and non-empty.
verify.rule: Ensure all mandatory fields are filled out.
Ensure mass estimate matches design constraints.

verify.value: All features traceable to part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each part and feature should map to specific geometry operations.

verify.value: All interfaces defined with matching requirements.
verify.rule: Interfaces should be reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Some fastener patterns lack explicit locking methods.
verify.rule: Critical joints must show locking and preload details.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on cooling inlet due to direct exposure to motor heat.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal flow simulations and adjust cooling path if necessary.

risk.desc: Limited accessibility for maintenance due to tight integration of components.
risk.mit: Include larger service access holes and clear labeling of inspection points.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at wing spar reinforcement flange under extreme conditions.
risk.mit: Perform additional stress analysis and reinforce if needed.

risk.desc: Inadequate documentation for fastener joint sanity, leading to potential assembly errors.
risk.mit: Add detailed documentation for all fastener patterns and joint configurations.

risk.desc: Process limitations may affect the accuracy of FDM parts, especially in complex geometries.
risk.mit: Review manufacturing strategy and consider alternative processes for critical features.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Equipment Bay Door, Wing Spar Reinforcement, Motor Pylon Mount

physics_paths.description: Heat from motor pylon transferred to ambient air via cooling inlet.
Structural loads from wing spar transferred to reinforcement ribs.
Access to interior equipment through equipment bay door.

Airflow over wing surface to wingtip
Heat dissipation from electronics to wing skin via ribs

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual and dimensional checks on spar sockets and anti-rotation keys

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to insufficient heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Increase the size and number of thermal dissipation fins.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have proper strain relief and follow recommended bend radii.

risk.desc: Insufficient accessibility for maintenance personnel.
risk.mit: Improve the design of the removable access cover to ensure better visibility and reachability.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly due to complex snap-fit latches.
risk.mit: Simplify the snap-fit latch design or provide clearer assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Potential interference between control horn mount and pushrod entry port.
risk.mit: Adjust the position of the control horn mount or pushrod entry port to avoid interference.
